description: Decompose Contoso's order monolith into four bounded contexts (Orders, Inventory, Payments, Notifications) with Azure Service Bus for async workflows. Preserve existing mobile clients and public REST contracts during strangler migration.
constraints: No double-charging: payment idempotency keys must survive retries
Inventory reservations must be strongly consistent within the inventory service
Notification fan-out must tolerate downstream rate limits
assumptions: Current monolith database can be split by schema with minimal cross-schema joins
Mobile clients can add correlation headers within one release train
inlineRequirements: Document saga compensation paths for cancel-order and payment reversal

documents.name: bounded-contexts.txt
documents.content: Fictional contexts: Orders (commands), Inventory (stock), Payments (stripe adapter), Notifications (email/push).

topologyHints: Avoid synchronous chain longer than two network hops on checkout hot path
Prefer topics with subscriptions per downstream consumer
securityBaselineHints: mTLS between internal services where supported
Rotate Service Bus keys via Key Vault references only
